case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. POWIS, MARK W.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POWIS, MARK W. $1,604.93 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,684.93

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,774.95 AS TO DEFENDANT POWIS, MARK W.
